# DataCrawl AI Site Guide

DataCrawl is a webhook validation and schema drift detection platform for automation workflows.

## Canonical Site
- https://www.datacrawl.org/

## Core Pages
- Home: https://www.datacrawl.org/
- Solutions: https://www.datacrawl.org/solutions
- Validation: https://www.datacrawl.org/validation
- Pricing: https://www.datacrawl.org/pricing
- Contact: https://www.datacrawl.org/contact

## Product Focus
- Webhook payload validation before workflow execution
- Schema drift detection for API and webhook integrations
- Safe payload normalization for known field and type changes
- Reliability monitoring for Make.com, n8n, and Zapier automations

## Crawl And Use Policy
- Public marketing and guide content may be indexed.
- AI crawlers are allowed by robots policy.
- Use canonical URLs from sitemap and page canonical tags.

## Contact
- contact@datacrawl.org
